narrative:
Brooklyn City Sd city school district has 7,328 registered voters, with 60.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 10.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 18.8 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +5.9% D−R vs +23.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
